phase3_findings.description: (park-calibration promoted, corroborated 4x) gh-fresh.sh stderr buffered-then-replayed — undisclosed behavioral change. Resolved by disclosing in the header.
(park-calibration promoted, engine pass + shadow) gh-fresh.sh header DEFER enumeration omitted the could-not-establish third branch. Resolved by completing the enumeration.
(shadow) arm1 asserted only the generic ::warning:: prefix, not the DEVFLOW_APP_ID-empty guard message (shape-3 sibling of the iter-1 arm23 fix). Resolved by pinning the specific guard message.

skipped_checks.reason: working tree dirty at run time (uncommitted edits); ran clean on the committed tree — verified 0 STALE via stale-prose pre-check and on the committed iter-2 tree

fix_delta_gate: clean (blinded general-purpose reviewer verified all three changes accurate against the code, arm1 tightening genuine with arm22 positive control; [])

phase3_findings.description: resolve_real_gh self-exclusion computes self from $0-derived path; for a by-NAME invocation (production shape) $0='gh' → dirname '.' → self miscomputed, but unreachable because the install step always sets an executable absolute DEVFLOW_GH_REAL so resolve_real_gh returns before the PATH walk. Untested for the by-name case.

gh-fresh.sh TOKEN_FILE/FINGERPRINT_FILE default to ${RUNNER_TEMP:-/tmp}/... while the install step exports only DEVFLOW_GH/DEVFLOW_GH_REAL as absolute paths (not the two file paths). Agent-side freshness depends on RUNNER_TEMP being byte-identical in the claude-code-action sandbox; if it differs, the wrapper finds no token/fingerprint and the feature goes inert — but LOUD and SAFE (breadcrumbs + fail-fast, degrades to pre-#487 status quo, never a silent-stale ride). Recommend exporting DEVFLOW_GH_TOKEN_FILE + DEVFLOW_GH_FINGERPRINT_FILE absolute into GITHUB_ENV, mirroring DEVFLOW_GH_REAL. Trigger is cloud-env-dependent (not locally verifiable).

untested defensive error branches: surface-2 rename-failure (264-265, only literal-count-pinned), extraheader-rewrite failure (244-245), no-key guard shadowed by app_id precedence (119). Exhaustively-covered surface otherwise; pins confirmed behavioral (arm21b/arm4b not vacuous), arm1 now pins specific message.

shadow.park_calibration_gate: clean: no parked finding matched a mis-grade shape (all Suggestions correctly graded — unreachable-in-prod / fail-closed-loud / defensive-branch coverage on an exhaustively-tested surface)
shadow.over_grade_gate: n/a (no promote-path Critical/Important on this pass)
